risks.description: Shadow workflow may inadvertently modify tracked source code.
risks.mitigation: Workflow runs with contents:read and refuses dirty checkout before exit.
risks.detection_method: git status check inside run-shadow.mjs before producing evidence
risks.rollback_or_fallback: Discard the run; do not commit evidence.

risks.description: Shadow workflow may push a branch or open a PR.
risks.mitigation: Workflow has no push, no PR, no merge step; contents:read only.
risks.rollback_or_fallback: Delete branch and close PR if any are created; stop the pilot.

risks.description: Validation output may include secret-shaped strings from local environment.
risks.mitigation: Validation runs structured checks; raw output is not persisted.
risks.detection_method: redact() in run-shadow.mjs replaces tokens, keys, and PEM blocks.
